title: HeadsmanôÇs Edge
description: Added the HeadsmanôÇs Edge enchantment for axes. It allows you to obtain mob heads when killing them.
body: The new HeadsmanôÇs Edge enchantment grants axes the power of a deadly precise strike. When any mob is slain with an enchanted axe, its head is always dropped as a trophy. This enchantment ensures a unique reward from every battle, perfect for collectors or players who enjoy decorating with the remains of their fallen foes.
